dashboard.label: Sleep
dashboard.description: Sleep stages, efficiency, latency and HRV trends
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Sleep","description":"Sleep stages, efficiency, latency and HRV trends","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"}},"dataSources":{"ds_sleep_contributors":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="contributors.deep_sleep" output=v_a | spath input=_raw path="contributors.efficiency" output=v_b | spath input=_raw path="contributors.latency" output=v_c | spath input=_raw path="contributors.rem_sleep" output=v_d | spath input=_raw path="contributors.restfulness" output=v_e | spath input=_raw path="contributors.timing" output=v_f | spath input=_raw path="contributors.total_sleep" output=v_g | head 1 | eval "Deep Sleep"=round(v_a,0), "Efficiency"=round(v_b,0), "Latency"=round(v_c,0), "REM Sleep"=round(v_d,0), "Restfulness"=round(v_e,0), "Timing"=round(v_f,0), "Total Sleep"=round(v_g,0) | table "Deep Sleep","Efficiency","Latency","REM Sleep","Restfulness","Timing","Total Sleep" | transpose | rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score | sort -score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep score contributors"},"ds_score_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d avg(score) as Score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Sleep score trend"},"ds_sleep_score":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep | dedup id | head 1 | eval scolor=case(score<60,"#E8503A",score<75,"#F4A422",true(),"#4CAF50") | table score, scolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep score — latest (gauge)"},"ds_sleep_detail":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_detail | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_duration | spath input=_raw path=average_heart_rate output=average_heart_rate | spath input=_raw path=average_hrv output=average_hrv | spath input=_raw path=lowest_heart_rate output=lowest_heart_rate | sort -_time | head 1 | eval sleep_hours=round(total_sleep_duration/3600,1), latency_min=round(latency/60,0), bed_hours=round(time_in_bed/3600,1), avg_hr=round(average_heart_rate,1), avg_hrv=round(average_hrv,0), low_hr=round(lowest_heart_rate,0) | eval ecolor=case(efficiency<75,"#E8503A",efficiency<85,"#F4A422",true(),"#4CAF50") | table sleep_hours, bed_hours, efficiency, latency_min, avg_hr, avg_hrv, low_hr, ecolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep detail — latest (tiles)"},"ds_duration_detail":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_detail | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_duration | eval Deep=round(deep_sleep_duration/3600,2), REM=round(rem_sleep_duration/3600,2), Light=round(light_sleep_duration/3600,2), Awake=round(awake_time/3600,2) | timechart span=1d@d avg(Awake) as Awake, avg(REM) as REM, avg(Light) as Light, avg(Deep) as Deep","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Sleep stage duration trend"},"ds_stage_pct":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_detail | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_duration | sort -_time | head 1 | eval total=total_sleep_duration, deep_pct=round(deep_sleep_duration/total*100,0), rem_pct=round(rem_sleep_duration/total*100,0), light_pct=round(light_sleep_duration/total*100,0), awake_pct=round(awake_time/total*100,0), deep_h=round(deep_sleep_duration/3600,1), rem_h=round(rem_sleep_duration/3600,1), light_h=round(light_sleep_duration/3600,1), awake_h=round(awake_time/3600,1) | eval Deep=deep_h." hr (".deep_pct."%)", REM=rem_h." hr (".rem_pct."%)", Light=light_h." hr (".light_pct."%)", Awake=awake_h." hr (".awake_pct."%)", "SpO2 Avg"=tostring(round(spo2_percentage_average,1))."%" | table Deep, REM, Light, Awake, "SpO2 Avg"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep stage % — latest"},"ds_hypnogram_v2":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_detail | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_duration | sort -_time | head 1 | rex field=bedtime_start "T(?P<bed_h>\d{2}):(?P<bed_m>\d{2})" | eval bed_h=tonumber(bed_h), bed_m=tonumber(bed_m), bed_total_mins=(bed_h*60)+bed_m | rex field=sleep_phase_5_min max_match=0 "(?P<phases>.)" | mvexpand phases | streamstats count as idx | eval offset_min=(idx-1)*5, total_mins=bed_total_mins+offset_min, h=floor(total_mins/60) % 24, m=total_mins % 60, hh=if(h<10,"0".tostring(h),tostring(h)), mm=if(m<10,"0".tostring(m),tostring(m)), time_label=hh.":".mm, stage=case(phases="1","Deep",phases="2","Light",phases="3","REM",phases="4","Awake",true(),"Unknown") | where stage!="Unknown" | table offset_min, time_label, stage","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Hypnogram (stage timeline)"}},"visualizations":{"score_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_score"},"options":{"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('scolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":100,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"},"title":"Sleep Score"},"total_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"sleep_hours","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Total Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hr","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('sleep_hours')","align":"left"},"title":"Total Sleep"},"bed_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"bed_hours","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Time in Bed","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" hr","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('bed_hours')","align":"left"},"title":"Time in Bed"},"efficiency_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('efficiency')","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('ecolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":100,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Sleep Efficiency"},"latency_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"latency_min","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Latency","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" min","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('latency_min')","align":"left"},"title":"Sleep Latency"},"avg_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Avg HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Avg Heart Rate"},"low_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"low_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Lowest HR","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('low_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Lowest Heart Rate"},"avg_hrv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_detail"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_hrv","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Avg HRV","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" ms","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_hrv')","align":"left"},"title":"Avg HRV"},"contributors_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_contributors"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Sleep Score Contributors"},"score_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_score_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#F5A623"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Sleep Score Trend"},"duration_trend":{"type":"splunk.area","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_duration_detail"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#EDE7DA","#A9D2EE","#5AA6E0","#3A78AF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","yAxisTitle":"Hours","stackMode":"stacked"},"title":"Sleep Stage Duration Trend"},"hypnogram_v2":{"type":"hypnogram_viz.hypnogram","title":"Sleep Stage Timeline (Custom Hypnogram Viz)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hypnogram_v2"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","contentOpacity":0.6,"lanes":"[{"label": "Awake", "color": "#EDE7DA"}, {"label": "REM", "color": "#A9D2EE"}, {"label": "Light", "color": "#5AA6E0"}, {"label": "Deep", "color": "#3A78AF"}]"}},"deep_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Deep Sleep","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"Deep","majorColor":"#3A78AF","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('Deep')","label":"Deep Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"rem_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"REM Sleep","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"REM","majorColor":"#A9D2EE","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('REM')","label":"REM Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"light_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Light Sleep","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"Light","majorColor":"#5AA6E0","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('Light')","label":"Light Sleep","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"awake_pct_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","title":"Awake","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_stage_pct"},"options":{"majorField":"Awake","majorColor":"#EDE7DA","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('Awake')","label":"Awake","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":14,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","align":"left"}},"sleep_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these metrics
- **Sleep Score** — Oura's overall nightly sleep quality (0–100).
- **Sleep Efficiency** — % of time in bed actually asleep; higher is better.
- **Sleep Latency** — minutes to fall asleep after getting into bed.
- **Sleep stages** — Awake / REM (dreaming & memory) / Light / Deep (physical recovery); the hypnogram shows their order through the night.
- **Contributors** — the sub-scores Oura blends into the Sleep Score (timing, efficiency, restfulness, and more).

**Learn more:** [Oura — Sleep Score](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360025445574-Sleep-Score) · [Sleep Stages](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/11752397946003-Sleep-Stages)","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"score_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":200,"h":190}},{"item":"total_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":435,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"bed_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":630,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"efficiency_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":240,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"latency_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":825,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"avg_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1020,"y":20,"w":175,"h":190}},{"item":"low_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1215,"y":20,"w":205,"h":190}},{"item":"contributors_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":230,"w":690,"h":300}},{"item":"score_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":730,"y":230,"w":690,"h":300}},{"item":"duration_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":970,"w":1400,"h":270}},{"item":"deep_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1070,"y":550,"w":350,"h":130}},{"item":"rem_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":370,"y":550,"w":330,"h":130}},{"item":"light_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":720,"y":550,"w":330,"h":130}},{"item":"awake_pct_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":550,"w":330,"h":130}},{"item":"hypnogram_v2","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":700,"w":1400,"h":250}},{"item":"sleep_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":1260,"w":1400,"h":210}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":1490,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}}}}}
